LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT WXIII/225 BUSH, LLC MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE FOR DEFT-MOVING PARTY & FOR PLAINTIFF-OPPOSING PARTY. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED THE TEHNTATIVE RULING - DENY MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. GRANT & DENY MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. 1. DENY MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION CAUSES OF ACTION 1 TO 4 TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT WHETHER WXIII BREACH LEASE BY CHARGING UNREASONABLE OPERATING EXPENSES. 2. GRANT MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION AS TO 5TH CAUSE OF ACTION & CLAIM FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES AGAINST WXIII. APPLIED EQUIPTMENT CORP. V. LITTON SAUDI ARABIA 7 CAL 4 503 & FREEMAN MILLA V. LECKER 11 CAL 85. 3. DENY MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION AS TO PUNITIVE DAMAGES AGAINST FLYNN FAILED TO SHIFT THE BURDEN. HON. RONALD E. QUIDACHAY. REPORTER: BELDON YEE, CSR #2647
